news.summary: On May 23 rd , 2025, Reykjavik Energy (Orkuveita Reykjavíkur) successfully completed a green bond sale, expanding the green bond series OR1802142 GB. The company issued ISK 5,300 million in bonds at a yield of 7.78%. With this latest offering, the total nominal value of bonds in the series has reached ISK 11,538 million.
news.headline: Reykjavik Energy concludes green bond offering, increases series to ISK 11,538 million with 7.78% yield.
Publicly traded The Smarter Web Company bought 23.09 for £1.85 million for its treasury

news.summary: Sol-Gel Technologies, a dermatology company, reported its first-quarter financial results for 2025. Total revenue was $1 million, up from $0.5 million in 2024. Research and development expenses increased to $8.8 million, from $5.3 million in 2024 due to manufacturing development costs for SGT-610. General and administrative expenses decreased to $1.3 million from $1.8 million in 2024. The company reported a net loss of $8.8 million in Q1 2025, compared to $6.3 million in 2024. As of March 31, 2025, Sol-Gel had $16.9 million in cash. Sol-Gel expects its cash to fund requirements up to Q1 2027. Key products include TWYNEO and EPSOLAY. Sol-Gel focuses on developing products for skin diseases. The company's cash and assets are detailed in the condensed consolidated balance sheet provided. It includes a disclaimer regarding forward-looking statements and potential risks influencing the company's performance.
news.headline: Sol-Gel Technologies reported Q1 2025 results: $1 million revenue, $8.8 million R&D expenses, $1.3 million general expenses, $8.8 million net loss. Cash balance $16.9 million, projected to fund into Q1 2027. Company focuses on dermatology and has products for the treatment of acne and rosacea. Risk factors include ongoing clinical trials and regulatory approvals.

news.summary: The COMPUTEX 2025 event in Taipei wrapped up today after a successful four days of showcases and activities. The event saw a significant number of attendees, with 86,521 buyers hailing from 152 nations, such as Japan, the United States, South Korea, Vietnam, and India. This global event...
news.headline: COMPUTEX 2025 ends with 86,521 buyers from 152 countries. Accelerated AI deployment in Taiwan securing global position.

news.summary: Shanghai-based company UniXell Biotechnology Co., Ltd. recently made headlines on May 23, 2025, with the news of the successful introduction of their pioneering Parkinson's disease cell drug, UX-DA001, in China. This milestone was reached in March 2025, signifying a significant step forward in the field of cell therapies. UniXell Biotech specializes in innovative medical solutions and this recent development marks a crucial advancement for individuals suffering from Parkinson's disease.
news.headline: UniXell Biotechnology administers first dose of Parkinson's disease cell therapy in China for Phase 1 study.

news.summary: Paramount Global has joined forces with Advent Allen Entertainment to craft an unparalleled entertainment experience at The STRAT, inspired by the iconic Top Gun franchise. The collaboration was announced on May 23, 2025, in Los Angeles. This venture aims to deliver the ultimate "must-see" adventure for enthusiasts. Stay tuned as the project unfolds to bring the legacy of Top Gun to life in a groundbreaking manner.
news.headline: Paramount Global partners with Advent Allen Entertainment to create a Top Gun experience at The STRAT in Las Vegas.

news.summary: IonQ, a prominent entity in the field of commercial quantum computing and networking, has recently disclosed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Korea Institute of Science and Technology Information (KISTI). This move signifies a noteworthy stride in IonQ's existing collaboration with South Korea, spanning across government, academic, and industry spheres. KISTI, renowned as a national science and technology research institute and supercomputing center, is a key player in this arrangement. This strategic partnership is poised to fortify IonQ's foothold in South Korea and foster further advancements in the quantum computing domain.
news.headline: IonQ partners with KISTI to boost S. Korea’s role in quantum race, strengthening ties with government, academia, and industry.
Turkish Energy Minister: We aim to export two billion cubic meters of natural gas to Syria annually.

news.summary: The global panic attack treatment market is projected to grow from USD 2.92 billion in 2025 to USD 8.66 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.8%. The market encompasses pharmacological and non-pharmacological approaches to manage symptoms and reduce panic attack frequency. By 2025, the antidepressants segment is expected to hold over two-fifths of the market share. North America's panic attack treatment market is estimated to reach around USD 1 billion in 2025, while Europe is anticipated to hold nearly one-fourth of the global market share. Asia Pacific is expected to show the fastest growth due to increasing anxiety disorders and improved healthcare infrastructure. The prevalence of panic attacks has significantly risen, with a lifetime prevalence of 13.2%. Market growth may be limited by side effects of panic attack treatments, including fatigue, weight gain, and memory issues.
news.headline: Global panic attack treatment market to reach USD 8.66 billion by 2035 with 16.8% CAGR, driven by rising prevalence of panic disorder. Asia Pacific market to record fastest growth.

news.summary: Luminar Technologies, a prominent automotive technology company listed on NASDAQ with stock symbol LAZR, recently disclosed that it has engaged in private agreements with specific holders of its existing 1.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2026. These agreements involve the acquisition of $50 million in total principal amount of the notes through a combination of repurchases for about $30 million in cash and exchanges for 1.1 million newly issued shares of common stock. The transactions were negotiated separately and are significant for the company's financial operations.
news.headline: Luminar buys back $50M in Senior Notes, reducing debt with $30M in cash and 1.1M shares; cuts capital structure.

news.summary: On Thursday, Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company (NASDAQ: GT) announced an agreement to sell the majority of its Goodyear Chemical business to Gemspring Capital Management, LLC. Gemspring Capital will be acquiring Goodyear Chemical for approximately $650 million in cash, subject to customary post-closing adjustments. The deal includes two operational plants in Houston and Beaumont, Texas, as well as a research and development center in Akron, Ohio. Goodyear will retain ownership of its Chemical facilities in Niagara Falls, New York, and Bayport, Texas, along with rights to the products made at those locations. This information was not directly sourced.
news.headline: Goodyear sells Chemical business to Gemspring Capital for $650 million cash, aiming to reduce debt and support growth.

news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH) also known as PublicSquare, based in West Palm Beach, Fla., revealed the appointment of James Rinn as the new Chief Financial Officer, starting June 1, 2025. Rinn, previously a board member and chair of the PublicSquare Audit Committee from July 2023, will take on the CFO role. This change comes as Brad Searle, the current CFO, transitions to the position of Senior Vice President of Finance within the company. PublicSquare emphasizes valuing life, family, and liberty, positioning itself as America's primary marketplace and payments ecosystem.
news.headline: PublicSquare appoints James Rinn as CFO effective June 1, 2025, replacing Brad Searle who will be the new Senior VP of Finance.

news.summary: A company based in Woodcliff Lake, New Jersey, has released its preliminary fiscal year 2025 results and updated its fiscal 2026 outlook. The fourth quarter fiscal 2025 conference call is scheduled for Monday, June 16, 2025. The company will be participating in the 22nd Annual Craig-Hallum Institutional Investor event. Stay tuned for more details on the financial performance and projections.
news.headline: Powerfleet shares fiscal year 2025 results and fiscal year 2026 outlook ahead of conferences. Q4 conference call on June 16, 2025.

news.summary: Bank of America Corporation, headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina, disclosed on May 23, 2025, its plan to repurchase all CHF 375,000,000 principal amount of its 0.2525% Senior Notes set to mature on June 12, 2026. These Notes are identified by the ISIN CH0474977722 and Common Code 200733517. The redemption is scheduled for June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Bank of America to redeem CHF 375 million of 0.2525% Senior Notes due June 12, 2026. Redemptions to occur on June 12, 2025.

news.summary: Pelareorep activates a pro-inflammatory environment within tumors, promoting both innate and adaptive immune reactions. Recent investigations have verified that pelareorep prepares the tumor environment to enable blood-borne tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) to combat tumors. Existing TIL clones...
news.headline: Oncolytics Biotech announces new data at ASCO on Pelareorep's immune activation capabilities, leading to enhanced tumor-fighting responses.

news.summary: In a recent announcement made on May 23, 2025, London-based PlaySafe ID, a platform designed to safeguard gamers from cheaters, hackers, bots, and predators, successfully secured $1.12 million (€1 million) in pre-seed funding. This investment round was supported by Early Game Ventures, Hartmann Capital, and Overwolf. The funding aims to enhance trust within the gaming community and further develop the platform's offerings.
news.headline: PlaySafe ID secures $1.12M in pre-seed funding to enhance online gaming safety, backed by Early Game Ventures & Hartmann Capital.

news.summary: Following the approval of the final federal permit, an application has been submitted for up to $2 billion in funding. This represents an increase from the previously estimated $1.8 billion stated in the Letter of Interest. The higher funding amount is due to a revised estimate of job-years created by the project. If the application is approved, EXIM debt financing is expected to cover a significant portion of the project's development costs.
news.headline: Perpetua submits $2B application to EXIM Bank for Stibnite Gold Project, up from $1.8B, reflecting increased job-years.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, Old Republic International Corporation (NYSE: ORI) revealed that its Board of Directors approved a standard quarterly cash dividend of 29 cents per share. Shareholders registered on June 6, 2025, will receive this dividend on June 16, 2025.
news.headline: Old Republic declares 29 cents/share Q2 cash dividend, payable on June 16, 2025 to shareholders of record on June 6, 2025.

news.summary: Sodexo Inc. from North Bethesda, Maryland has recently disclosed the outcomes of its latest initiative on May 23, 2025. The Offeror shared important data concerning its project, but the specifics have not been made public yet due to legal restrictions on release, publication, or distribution in certain jurisdictions.
news.headline: Sodexo Inc. reports expiration of cash tender offer for certain USD notes.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 23, 2025, Tiziana Life Sciences, Ltd. (Nasdaq: TLSA), a leading biotechnology company, revealed progress in the treatment of moderate Alzheimer's disease. The Company's innovative intranasal foralumab, an anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody, has shown promise in combating brain inflammation associated with the disease. This development was highlighted in a national public radio feature reaching audiences across the United States. Tiziana's nasal spray represents a significant advancement in moderate Alzheimer's therapy, reflecting a positive step forward in research and treatment for the condition.
news.headline: Tiziana Life Sciences announces breakthrough in Alzheimer's treatment with intranasal foralumab, combating brain inflammation.

news.summary: Phunware is set to introduce cutting-edge AI features for hospitality to enhance mobile interactions. The company will be collaborating with industry experts to explore how innovative apps are transforming guest engagement. This move comes at a time when the demand for seamless mobile experiences is growing rapidly in the hospitality sector. Stay tuned for updates on how Phunware's new features will revolutionize the industry.
news.headline: Phunware introduces AI features at HITEC 2025 to enhance guest experience in hospitality industry.

news.summary: Toronto and Knoxville, Tennessee - May 23, 2025 - Solar Alliance Energy Inc. (‘Solar Alliance’ or ‘the Company’), a prominent solar energy solutions provider specializing in commercial and utility solar sectors, disclosed the lifting of the failure-to-file cease trade order by the British Columbia Securities Commission. This action followed the submission of the Company's audited annual financial statements and related management's discussion and analysis for the period ending December 31, 2024. Solar Alliance is now in the process of reconnecting with the TSX Venture Exchange to lift its suspension and recommence trading of the Company's common shares. The Company's stock is listed as TSX-V: SOLR and OTC: SAENF.
news.headline: Solar Alliance's cease trade order revoked by BC Securities Commission after filing financial statements for 2024. Trading to resume.

news.summary: On May 23rd, 2025, Chagee Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CHA), a prominent premium tea drinks brand renowned for its healthy and delicious freshly-made beverages, disclosed its intention to release its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31st, 2025. The report is scheduled to be unveiled before the commencement of the U.S. market on May 30th, 2025.
news.headline: Chagee Holdings will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 30, 2025, before U.S. market opens.

news.summary: Islamabad and Dubai, May 23, 2025: VEON Ltd. has successfully obtained all required regulatory approvals for its partnership with Engro Corporation Limited in Pakistan. This collaboration, revealed on December 5, 2024, aims to consolidate and oversee telecommunications infrastructure assets in the country. The move is anticipated to streamline digital investments and infrastructure operations in Pakistan, aligning with the nation's digital aspirations.VEON Ltd. operates on the Nasdaq under the symbol VEON.
news.headline: VEON and Engro Corp finalize infrastructure partnership in Pakistan after securing all regulatory approvals. Improving digital investments.

news.summary: Invivyd, Inc. revealed that its investigational monoclonal antibody, PEMGARDA ® (pemivibart), has been included in the National Comprehensive Cancer Network's Clinical Practice Guidelines for B-Cell Lymphomas. This addition follows the Infectious Disease Society of America's recommendation in August 2024 for using PEMGARDA for pre-exposure prophylaxis in moderately to severely immunocompromised individuals aged 12 and up at risk for severe COVID-19. The guidelines advise using PEMGARDA when regional variants are susceptible to pemivibart.
news.headline: Invivyd's PEMGARDA added to NCCN guidelines for B-cell lymphomas; IDSA recommends it for immunocompromised for COVID-19.

news.summary: Macro strategist Craig Shapiro from the Bear Traps Report advocated for holding Bitcoin, citing the constant challenge to the value of traditional currencies due to growing debt and inflation. Shapiro highlighted that higher deficits could result in future tax hikes if countries do not reduce spending. This, coupled with high inflation, diminishes the worth of a country's domestic currency, as evidenced by the 8.29% year-to-date drop in the U.S. Dollar Index value under President Donald Trump's fiscal policies. Shapiro emphasized the importance of having more wealth in outside money than inside money. He emphasized that this approach is becoming increasingly sensible worldwide. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Craig Shapiro, of Bear Traps Report, advocates holding Bitcoin due to inflation, high deficits reducing traditional currency value.

news.summary: Abaxx Technologies Inc., a financial software and market infrastructure company, announced that its subsidiary, Abaxx Singapore Pte. Ltd., has obtained ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification for its Information Security Management System. This certification validates that Abaxx Singapore’s exchange and clearing infrastructure, which includes the Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Clearinghouse, meets global standards for data security, risk management, and operational resilience. Abaxx is listed on the CBOE under ABXX and OTCQX under ABXXF.
news.headline: Abaxx Singapore obtains ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification for its Information Security Management System, ensuring data security.

news.summary: Brookfield Corporation, a leading company listed on the NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbols BN, has recently been given the green light by the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) to renew its normal course issuer bid. This bid allows Brookfield to buy back up to 143,027,158 of its Class A Limited Voting Shares, equivalent to 10% of the total public float of these shares. The purchases will take place on the open market through the TSX, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), and/or alternative trading systems. The normal course issuer bid is set to run from May 27, 2025, to May 26, 2026, with the option for Brookfield to conclude purchases earlier if the target number of shares is attained. During this period, Brookfield will acquire Class A Shares at the prevailing market price or a permissible alternate price.
news.headline: Brookfield renews bid to buy up to 143,027,158 Class A Shares (10% public float) from May 27, 2025 to May 26, 2026.

news.summary: On May 23, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Bayer AG, a leading life science company with divisions in Pharmaceuticals, Consumer Health, and Crop Science, is now eligible to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. The operator of regulated markets for trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities, OTC Markets Group Inc. (OTCQX: OTCM), facilitated this transition for Bayer AG. Previously trading on the Pink® market, Bayer AG now enjoys an upgraded status on the OTCQX with symbols BAYRY and BAYZF on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange.
news.headline: OTC Markets welcomes Bayer AG to OTCQX Best Market; Bayer AG now trades on OTCQX after upgrading from Pink market.

South Africa's High Commissioner to the UK says his country urges U.S. President Donald Trump to commit to the continuation of AGOA (African Growth and Opportunity Act). It’s a U.S. trade program that allows eligible countries in sub-Saharan Africa to export products to the U.S.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, it is projected that the worldwide eFuse Market will see a surge from an estimated USD 557.0 million in 2024 to USD 737.4 million by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.9% throughout the forecast period. The boost in the eFuse Market is fueled by increasingly complex factors contributing to a significant rise in market value.
news.headline: Global eFuse Market to reach $737.4 million by 2030, with a 4.9% CAGR from $557.0 million in 2024. Accelerated growth expected.

news.summary: Nobel laureate economist Paul Krugman has expressed concerns about the U.S. economy mirroring vulnerabilities seen in developing economies. In a recent Substack newsletter, Krugman warned of a potential crisis titled "Gaming Out A Sudden Stop." He highlighted the risk of a sudden halt in foreign capital inflows leading to a housing market crash, devaluation of the dollar, and the onset of stagflation. Krugman pointed out the similarity between the U.S. economy's reliance on foreign investment to support trade deficits and past crises in emerging markets. The scenario raised by Krugman underscores the fragility of the U.S. economy and its susceptibility to external shocks. Elizabeth Warren also recently criticized government policies favoring billionaires like Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk. Krugman's warnings echo concerns about the economy's current state and the potential for a crisis reminiscent of those witnessed in developing nations.
news.headline: Economist Paul Krugman warns of a potential crisis in the US with housing crash, dollar plunge, and stagflation.

news.summary: Last week, a new report stated that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, marking an increase of 2.3% compared to the previous month. This means that over 1.3 million people are currently unemployed. The report also revealed that the inflation rate has reached 3.2%, the highest it has been in the past two years. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was only 0.5%, which is lower than the projected 1.2%. These numbers highlight the challenges being faced by the economy, as the country continues to grapple with the effects of the ongoing pandemic.
news.headline: Netherlands PM confirms Trump's attendance at NATO summit in The Hague.
China's leading lithium producer plays a crucial role in global battery market, with annual output of 50,000 tons.

news.summary: According to the latest report, the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, showing an increase of 1.4% compared to the last quarter. This rise in unemployment has resulted in a total of 1.5 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the report highlights a decrease in job creation with only 200,000 new jobs added in the past month, falling short of the projected 300,000 new jobs. The government is set to implement new measures to address this concerning trend and stimulate job growth in the coming months.
news.headline: NY’s pipeline deal may affect MA, shifting the battleground.

news.summary: In an announcement made recently, it was reported that the national unemployment rate declined to 4.5% in the month of July, marking a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. The number of job additions in the nonfarm sector surpassed expectations, with 250,000 new positions created during this period. The positive trend in employment figures has also been reflected in the rise of average hourly earnings by 0.4% in July. Furthermore, the total number of long-term unemployed individuals decreased by 193,000 to 2.4 million. These improvements in the labor market have highlighted the ongoing recovery in the economy post the recent challenges.
news.headline: Investor concerns rise over US as stocks set for weekly slide; market decline amid uncertainty.

news.summary: Dublin - A new report titled "Interactive Kiosk Market: Analysis By Component, By Type, By End-Use Industry, By Region Size and Trends - Forecast up to 2030" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global value of interactive kiosks was recorded at US$34.26 billion in 2024, with a projected increase to US$54.51 billion by 2030. The growth is attributed to factors like the increasing use of self-service technology in different sectors and the transition towards digital automation in customer service.
news.headline: Global interactive kiosk market to grow by 59% to reach US$54.51 billion by 2030, driven by self-service tech adoption and digital solutions in customer service.

news.summary: Booz Allen Hamilton, a company listed as BAH on the New York Stock Exchange, recently released preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025. The numbers suggest significant performance data for the company's most recent financial period.
news.headline: Booz Allen Hamilton reports Q4 and FY 2025 results, details undisclosed.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, the 2025 China-Central and Eastern European Countries Expo kicked off in Ningbo, China, emphasizing cultural and business exchanges between China and the CEE region. The event highlighted the increasing partnership between the two regions. One notable participant in this collaboration is Vladimir.
news.headline: 2025 China-CEEC Expo in Ningbo highlights cultural and business exchanges between China and CEE countries.

news.summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) recently announced the purchase of approximately 117,000 acres of premium timberlands in North Carolina and Virginia from Roanoke Timberlands LLC for $375 million. These forests, known for their high productivity, will complement Weyerhaeuser's existing timber and mill operations in North Carolina and expand its footprint into southeastern Virginia, an area with promising market opportunities. The company anticipates that this acquisition will generate significant and consistent cash flows, enhancing its Southern Timberlands business. The acquired timberlands are located in thriving sawlog and fiber markets in the U.S. South, with 81% of the land being pine-planted and predominantly fee-owned.
news.headline: Weyerhaeuser acquires 117,000 acres of timberlands for $375 million in North Carolina and Virginia, promises strong cash flows.

news.summary: This week, notable financial updates were announced via PR Newswire. GoDaddy revealed the Most Entrepreneurial Cities of 2025. Additionally, Workday introduced new AI agents. The influx of press releases this week highlights the challenge of sifting through the numerous updates. The financial sector witnessed significant activity, with GoDaddy forecasting the top entrepreneurial cities for 2025, and Workday unveiling innovative AI agents.
news.headline: Weekly recap of 15 finance press releases from PR Newswire, featuring GoDaddy's Most Entrepreneurial Cities of 2025 and new AI agents from Workday.

news.summary: In Denver, Modiv Industrial, Inc. (NYSE:MDV), the sole public REIT dedicated to acquiring industrial manufacturing real estate, announced details regarding the reverse stock proposal in their proxy statement for the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. The CEO released a clarifying message emphasizing the significance of this proposal. The company's focus on industrial manufacturing real estate is evident in their strategic decisions as outlined in the recent proxy statement for the upcoming meeting.
news.headline: Modiv CEO clarifies reverse stock split proposal impact. Proxy statement 2025 set forth rationale.

news.summary: Generation Mining Limited (TSX:GENM, OTCQB: GENMF) has recently disclosed that a notable Canadian financial institution has expressed its intention to offer a new long-term credit facility worth up to $200 million for the Marathon Copper-Palladium Project. This additional funding, alongside the senior secured project finance facility to be organized with the mandated senior lenders, is anticipated to provide substantial financial support for the Project. Jamie Levy, President of Gen Mining, conveyed enthusiasm regarding this development.
news.headline: Generation Mining Limited received support for up to $200 million from leading financial lender for Marathon Project.
